positive: A stylized, symmetrical geometric floral arrangement, reminiscent of Art Deco stained glass and sacred geometry. The central motif is a pair of stylized, mythical hummingbirds intertwined with symmetrical foliage (leaves, vines, lotus pads). The background should be a solid, clean gradient of deep midnight blue to royal purple. Utilize a restricted palette of metallic gold, iridescent teal, and creamy ivory for the foreground elements. High contrast, strong linework, bold silhouettes, vector graphic aesthetic, clean flat colors, perfect symmetry, suitable for a high-quality screen print on apparel, isolated on a white background for maximum versatility.
